scripts.kill-ports: lsof -ti:8045 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:8046 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'Ports 8045/8046 cleared'
scripts.dev: pnpm run kill-ports && pnpm run build:tailwind && (pnpm run dev:backend & pnpm run build:tailwind:watch & sleep 5 && pnpm run dev:frontend & wait)
scripts.verify: pnpm run check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
scripts.build: pnpm run build:tailwind && cd frontend && dx build --release
